◎简　　介  

　　"The Simone Biles Story: Courage to Soar" follows Simone Biles through the sacrifices and hard work that led her to win 19 Olympic & World Championship medals and ultimately cemented her stake as one of the greatest gymnasts of all time. Simone's journey from foster care to the Olympic podium - with all of its triumphs & heartbreaks - can serve as an inspiration for every little girl with a dream.
